case_title: NICOLE SOLOMAN VS. DIXIE RESTAURANT, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF SOLOMAN, NICOLE AS TO DEFENDANT DIXIE RESTAURANT, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SOLOMAN, NICOLE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DIXIE RESTAURANT, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY $2,385.90 PRINCIPAL, $2.14 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,613.04, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
